author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625

patch.value: Contracts command lookup should handle package namespace roots

The 2026-06-25 source-map audit found that an installed package namespace can expose help at the root command path while pm contracts --command <namespace> reports unknown_command; child command lookup works.

The intended contract behavior for package namespace roots is defined; pm contracts either returns namespace metadata/child-command guidance for roots like changelog or emits a clearer package-namespace error; regression coverage exercises installed package namespace root and child command; pnpm contracts:check and package command discovery tests pass.
Run node dist/cli.js changelog --help, then node dist/cli.js contracts --command changelog --flags-only --json and node dist/cli.js contracts --command "changelog generate" --flags-only --json.
Contracts lookup gives useful namespace-level metadata or a precise guidance error for the package namespace root, while child command lookup remains valid.
Root namespace help exists, but contracts --command changelog returns unknown_command; contracts --command "changelog generate" works.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Duplicate check before create: status-all search for contracts --command changelog unknown_command package root command full path changelog generate found related closed items pm-7etc, pm-4os2/pm-d6kq class work, and pm-zqes class work, but no open direct namespace-root contracts item.

message: Create package namespace contracts tracking issue

value.note: regress namespace root and child command contract behavior

patch.value: emit command_namespace guidance for package command roots

value.note: regress namespace root and child command contract behavior

value.author: codex-20260625
value.text: Evidence: implemented command_namespace guidance for package namespace roots in contracts lookup; added regression coverage for changelog namespace roots and child commands. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/contracts-command.spec.ts (36 tests), pnpm contracts:check, node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (100/100/100/100), static-quality gate docstrings 237/237 source and 1840/1840 exported.

patch.value: pm contracts --command changelog now reports command_namespace with concrete changelog export/generate retry examples; changelog generate/export child lookups return extension-provided flag contracts.

pm contracts --command <package namespace> gives precise child-command guidance instead of unknown_command, while pm contracts --command '<namespace> <child>' continues to return the child command flags.
Implemented command_namespace recovery for package namespace roots in pm contracts and preserved child command contracts for installed package commands.

Resolved: contracts now emits command_namespace guidance for package namespace roots and child command contracts remain valid; focused tests, contracts check, full coverage, static quality, and release gates passed.

value.note: generated by pm-changelog after closing namespace contracts item

value.author: codex-20260625
value.text: Evidence: refreshed CHANGELOG.md through pm-changelog 2026.6.20 after closure; pnpm changelog:pm:check now passes with item_count=1340 and changed=false.

value.author: codex-20260625
value.text: Review response: split the package namespace-root regression into its own dedicated test case after Gemini feedback. Verification: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/contracts-command.spec.ts passed 37 tests.

author: codex-gpt5
message: Reopen for PR #366 review follow-up: cap contracts namespace suggestions and fallback candidates to preserve token-efficient error payloads.

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: Review response: capped command namespace recovery output after Gemini feedback. Namespace-root errors now display at most 10 child commands in the message and return at most 20 fallback candidates, while still preserving the first concrete retry and examples. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/contracts-command.spec.ts (38 tests), node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (100/100/100/100; 5098 tests), node scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs --json (source docstrings 237/237 and exported docstrings 1840/1840), pnpm contracts:check, pm health summary ok, git diff --check clean.

patch.value: Closed after PR #366 review follow-up: contracts namespace guidance is now token-efficient for large extension command groups, with bounded displayed children and fallback candidates plus regression coverage and full gates.
